response.original_title: How do I login with a Kraken QR code? {Instant Help}
response.overview: Call for Help ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 Scan the display code using your mobile app's internal camera ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) to instantly authorize a desktop session without typing details ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) which is both a fast and secure way to ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) jump into the trading charts from any compatible computer Can I share my Kraken login with a partner? Sharing credentials is not recommended for security reasons so instead ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) use the business account features to add authorized users ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) who have their own unique set of secure permissions ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (UK) & ☎️+1-[864].336.8850 (US) and keys to access the shared organizational digital funds
response.title: How do I login with a Kraken QR code? {Instant Help}
